title: Ariadne-2025 Anetaki source acquisition (frontier F8/F1)

resolution_of_the_contradiction.K_epoch_claim: 'Anetaki scepter published (Ariadne Supplements 2025) and NOT in silver' — HALF-RIGHT: the PRELIMINARY overview is published (volume imprint 2024, media wave March-April 2025 explains the 2025 dating; same edition), but the ring IS partially in silver as KNZg57a (5 preliminary tokens via lineara.xyz)
resolution_of_the_contradiction.J1_M_claim: 'no complete transliteration public; editio princeps unpublished' — CONFIRMED as of 2026-07-08: Kanta et al. 2024 prints ZERO transliterated sign sequences (verified against the PDF); Anetaki II (Kanta ed., INSTAP Academic Press) remains forthcoming (instappress.org checked: not listed)
resolution_of_the_contradiction.both_correct: publication-STATUS and transliteration-AVAILABILITY are different axes; the conflict was verbal, not factual
